fluenza Vaccine Supply Frequently Asked Questions 
Learn More about Flu Vaccine Supply and Distribution 
Thimerosal in Flu Vaccine 
Flu vaccines in multi-dose vials contain thimerosal to safeguard against contamination of the vial.

Reminder 
Influenza vaccine distribution information for the 2025-2026 season will be posted here as CDC receives it, typically on Fridays. Please continue to check this page for the most up-to-date information.

Influenza (Flu) 
Influenza (flu) is a contagious respiratory illness caused by influenza viruses that infect the nose, throat, and lungs.
